# Spiral Roadmap

This fixture keeps representative math content inside the repository.

Inline expressions appear throughout the roadmap: \(x\), \(f(x)\), \(F(x)\),
\(dx\), \(\operatorname{Subst}\), and \(E = mc^2\).

\[
\int F(f(x))\,f'(x)\,dx \to \operatorname{Subst}\left(\int F(x)\,dx, x, f(x)\right)
\]

\[
\sum_{n=0}^{\infty} ar^n = \frac{a}{1-r}
\]
